title: REGISTROS INTERACTIVOS DE DESINFECCIÓN Y USO DE DESINFECTANTES, VEHÍCULOS DE TRANSPORTE QUE ENTRAN EN LA EXPLOTACIÓN, ENTRADAS A LAS NAVES E INSPECCIONES DIARIAS DE LA MANADA DE AVES DE CORRAL
description: A guide providing interactive templates for recording disinfection procedures, transport vehicle entries, barn access, and daily inspections of poultry flocks to support biosecurity measures. It explains Poland's 2022 regulatory requirements and details how to download, customize, and maintain Word or Excel forms for data collection and official audits.
